The classification of this plant is still being researched, but it is believed to be a member of the genus Ganua. The family Annonaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as custard apples or soursop relatives. More research is needed to fully understand the classification and taxonomy of Ganua boerlageana.
